case_title: BONATI, PRISCA vs. ESPINOSA, PEDRO A et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA SERVED OCT-18-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $100.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1210 HAMPSHIRE ST, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE PERSONAL SERVICE ON 04-OCT-93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $182.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A
DECLARATION OF PRISCA BONATI FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONATI, PRISCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, PEDRO A THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/10/93 $2,110.00 RENT, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,210.00, LEASE FORFEITED
